scripts.spec:check: quint typecheck spec/sync-v2.qnt && quint typecheck spec/mst-diff.qnt && quint typecheck spec/sync-buggy-mutual-done.qnt
scripts.spec:run: quint run --backend=typescript --invariants convergenceInv finishInvariantInv noMissedKeysInv --witnesses 'state.get("a").roundComplete and state.get("b").roundComplete and network == Set()' --max-steps=40 --max-samples=2000 spec/sync-v2.qnt
scripts.spec:mst: quint run --backend=typescript --invariants diffCompleteInv diffSoundInv historyIndepInv equalSkipsDiffInv applyingDiffIsIdempotentInv --max-steps=20 --max-samples=2000 spec/mst-diff.qnt
